title: MediConnect Microservices Platform
description: Designed and implemented a healthcare microservices platform for authentication, appointments, and notifications using asynchronous event flows.
outcome: Improved service fault tolerance with JWT-based RBAC, circuit breakers, and monitored Kubernetes workloads.

title: Cafe Order Management System
description: Built an event-driven microservices application for order, payment, and inventory services with real-time frontend updates.
outcome: Implemented SAGA-based distributed transaction handling to maintain eventual consistency during service failures.

title: Quotation Search API Optimization
description: Rebuilt quotation retrieval around OpenSearch to replace expensive PostgreSQL scans in a multi-service quote workflow.
outcome: Reduced API latency from 40-60s to 5-6s in production-oriented service flows.

title: Connected Vehicle Telemetry Pipeline
description: Developed and maintained Spring Boot services for telemetry ingestion and analytics, handling high-volume automotive event traffic.
outcome: Handled 100K+ daily telemetry requests, improved average latency from 1.5s to 1.3s, and automated 200GB+ weekly archival to AWS S3.

title: Resilient Gateway and CQRS Improvements
description: Enhanced service reliability with Spring Cloud Gateway policies, rate limiting, and Resilience4j while contributing to CQRS-aligned service patterns.
outcome: Improved production stability and reduced bottlenecks through fault isolation and reliability patterns.
